title: Sherweb Secures $125 Million Investment to Accelerate Global Expansion
author: Business Wire
full_text: Sherweb Secures $125 Million Investment to Accelerate Global Expansion MONTRÉAL — Sherweb, an award-winning cloud distributor, today announced the successful closing of a $125 million minority equity investment from Investissement Québec, of which $49.9 million was provided by the Government of Québec’s Fonds pour la croissance … MONTRÉAL Sherweb, an award-winning cloud distributor, today announced the successful closing of a $125 million minority equity investment from Investissement Québec, of which $49.9 million was provid…
summary: Sherweb, a cloud distributor, has secured a $125 million minority equity investment from Investissement Québec. The funding includes $49.9 million provided by the Government of Québec's Fonds pour la croissance. This investment aims to support Sherweb's global expansion efforts. With this new capital, Sherweb plans to accelerate its growth worldwide. The company has previously received awards for its cloud distribution services.

author: Admin
full_text: Baltimore Sues Elon Musk’s xAI Over Grok Sexual ‘Deepfakes’ The city of Baltimore sued Elon Musk’s xAI on Tuesday, claiming its Grok chatbot illegally generates nonconsensual sexually explicit images, including of children. Baltimore, with a population of about 568,000, is the largest city to sue xAI over “deepfakes” … The city of Baltimore sued Elon Musk’s xAI on Tuesday, claiming its Grok chatbot illegally generates nonconsensual sexually explicit images, including of children. Baltimore, with a population of ab…
summary: The city of Baltimore has filed a lawsuit against Elon Musk's company xAI over the use of its Grok chatbot to create "deepfakes", or non-consensual sexually explicit images. The images allegedly include those of children. This is the largest city to sue xAI over this issue. The city claims that the chatbot generates these images illegally. The lawsuit was filed on Tuesday.

full_text: Student Housing Is Changing Fast. Public-Private Partnerships Are Key. summary: The traditional experience of sending a child off to college is changing rapidly. Public-private partnerships are becoming key players in student housing. These collaborations aim to provide high-quality accommodations and amenities for students, while also addressing issues such as affordability and sustainability. Traditional on-campus residence halls may not be able to meet the evolving needs of students and families. The partnership model offers a potential solution to these challenges.

title: Top WTO official sounds fertilizer warning over war
author: hurriyetdailynews.com
full_text: Top WTO official sounds fertilizer warning over war Disruptions to fertilizer supplies caused by the Middle East war pose a double threat to global food security through scarcity and high prices, a top World Trade Organization official has warned. YAOUNDE Disruptions to fertilizer supplies caused by the Middle East war pose a double threat to global food security through scarcity and high prices, a top World Trade Organization official has wa…
summary: A top World Trade Organization official has warned that disruptions to fertilizer supplies due to the Middle East war threaten global food security. The shortages could lead to both scarcity and higher prices of fertilizers. This double threat is expected to impact food availability worldwide. Fertilizer scarcity can limit crop yields, exacerbating the issue. The warning highlights the potential consequences of the conflict on global food supply chains.
